parameters.content:
## What this does

Every 30 min: pulls all transactions for the last 30 min (Eastern,
paged), checks each for a non-'Successful' status, and **posts to
Microsoft Teams only when there are errors**.

## Setup (paste 2 values into Session + Filters)
1. **sessionJson** — full contents of session.json (from node login.js)
2. **teamsWebhookUrl** — your Teams Incoming Webhook URL

## To notify on EVERY run (even all-clear)
Delete the **Any Errors?** IF node and connect Check For Errors
straight to Post To Teams. The card already shows a green ✅ when
there are no errors.

## Error definition
Any transaction whose status isn't 'Successful'. Adjust the isError()
check in **Check For Errors** if the portal uses other 'ok' statuses.

## Daily
session.json expires (~a day). When runs fail with 'session expired',
re-run node login.js and paste the fresh session.json.
